signIn.title: Sign in to Paperclip
signIn.subtitle: Use your email and password to access this instance.

signUp.title: Create your Paperclip account
signUp.subtitle: Create an account for this instance. Email confirmation is not required in v1.

boardClaim.claimedDescription: This instance is now linked to your authenticated user.
boardClaim.signInRequiredDescription: Sign in or create an account, then return to this page to claim Board ownership.
boardClaim.claimDescription: This will promote your user to instance admin and migrate company ownership access from local trusted mode.

invite.notAvailableDescription: This invite may be expired, revoked, or already used.
invite.bootstrapCompleteDescription: The first instance admin is now configured. You can continue to the board.
invite.joinRequestDescription: Your request is pending admin approval. You will not have access until approved.
invite.signInRequired: Sign in or create an account before submitting a human join request.
